O'quv markazlari va talabalar tanlovi: The Choice of Language Centers and Students
hero.label: NEXT-GEN JLPT PREP PLATFORM
hero.description: Mikan is more than just a collection of tests. It's an AI-driven personal tutor that analyzes your mistakes and leads you from N5 to N1 the fastest way.
feat.dashboard_desc: Monitor your students' growth in real-time. Deep analytical reports for every group and individual.
feat.result_desc: Get a roadmap to fix your mistakes immediately after finishing a test.
feat.ai_desc: Artificial intelligence identifies your weak spots and suggests specific topics for review.
Platformamiz har qanday darajadagi talab: Our platform provides an individual prep plan for students of any level. Learn at your own pace.
services.title_desc: Tired of ordinary courses? Mikan platform merges education with technology and gamification.
services.item1.title: JLPT Mock Exam Engine
services.item1.desc: True exam simulation. Anti-cheat system and secure browser environment.
services.item1.full_desc: No possibility to copy or inspect code. The system terminates the exam upon suspicious activity. Schools can manage students via 'Invite Codes'.
services.item2.title: AI Smart Flashcards
services.item2.desc: Visual memory and Spaced Repetition-based vocabulary learning.
services.item2.full_desc: It's not just a card. The system automatically generates relevant images. Spaced intervals for forgotten words are included.
services.item3.title: Global Chat-Roulette
services.item3.desc: Live interaction with students from other centers.
services.item3.full_desc: Multi-tenant system allows students from different edu-centers to meet and practice Japanese in a safe environment.
services.item4.title: Speaking AI Sensei
services.item4.full_desc: Talk about various topics with AI. It corrects your mistakes and evaluates your pronunciation instantly.
services.item5.title: Gaming Nihongo
services.item5.desc: Team battles: Tug-of-war and knowledge duels.
services.item5.full_desc: Students divide into teams and compete to solve tasks fast. Interactive games boost motivation.
services.item6.title: Grammar Mastery Path
services.item6.desc: Interactive learning roadmap in Duolingo style.
services.item6.full_desc: All rules from N5 to N1 laid out in a roadmap.sh-like sequence. Pick your level and climb to the top.
services.item7.title: And many more features...
services.item7.desc: The platform is constantly updated with new functionalities.
method.s1_d: A diagnostic test identifies your current strengths and weaknesses.
method.s2_d: The AI algorithm shows exactly which grammar or kanji you need to review.
method.s3_d: Validate your level with full-scale mock exams based on JLPT standards.
contact.title: Any questions? Contact Us
contact.desc: Fill out the form for more info or partnership. Our specialists will reach out within 24 hours.
contact.success: Your request has been sent successfully!
contact.error: An error occurred. Please try again.
footer.desc: The most innovative platform for Japanese level assessment and JLPT preparation.
Savollaringiz bormi? Mutaxassis bilan ga: Have questions? Talk to an expert.
privacy.seo_description: Learn about user data protection and privacy policy on the Mikan platform.
privacy.section1_text: Mikan platform considers the protection of user personal data as its top priority. This policy provides information on how your data is collected and used.
privacy.data_item3: Test results and learning process statistics;
privacy.section3_text: The collected data is used to provide platform services, analyze personal learning results, and inform users about important news.
privacy.contact_text: If you have any questions regarding the privacy policy, please contact us at:
terms.seo_description: Familiarize yourself with the rules and terms of using the Mikan platform.
terms.section1_text: By accessing or using the Mikan platform, you fully agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree with the terms, we recommend not using the services.
terms.section2_text: Mikan is an online platform for JLPT and other Japanese language exam preparation. We provide users with tests, innovative analytics, and study materials.
terms.rule_item1: Providing only accurate and current information during registration;
terms.rule_item2: Prohibition of copying or unauthorized distribution of platform content;
terms.rule_item3: Personally ensuring the security of your account and password.
terms.note_text: Mikan administration reserves the right to modify these terms at any time. Changes take effect from the moment they are published on the page.
Hozircha hech qanday o'quv guruhi yarati: No study groups have been created yet

Ushbu imtihon sizning bilimlaringizni re: This exam is designed to test your knowledge in real-time.
Imtihon qo'llanmasi:
Once the exam starts, you cannot use any auxiliary tools.

If the following are detected, the exam will end automatically and your score will be 0:

• Pressing F12, Ctrl+Shift+I, Ctrl+Shift+J
• Switching to another tab/window
• Right-clicking or copy-pasting
• Extensions like Google Translate, Grammarly
• Exiting fullscreen mode

Breaking these rules means total disqualification. The system logs all your activities.
no_attempts_left: Multiple rule violations detected. The exam has been ended automatically.
window_blur_msg: You have left the exam window
error_submitting: An error occurred while submitting. Please try again.
